3082550.name: ナレハテ / Karma Soundtrack
3082550.description:
Karma is a walking simulator game where you journey through a world of hell. To further enrich the immersive experience, we are excited to present the complete soundtrack from the game.

Some tracks have been remixed to provide an even more luxurious listening experience. Enjoy the collection of 52 tracks that are dark and eerie, yet somehow warm and comforting.
